CONTENT.Early life: Ruben Aguilar was born on 26 April 1993 in Grenoble, Isère.
CONTENT.Club career: Aguilar joined Auxerre in 2014 from Grenoble. He made his Ligue 2 debut on 1 August 2014 against Le Havre in a 2–0 home win. In the 2016–17 season, he played 30 league matches for the club.In May 2017, Aguilar signed with Montpellier. On 6 August 2019, he joined Monaco on a five-year deal.
CONTENT.Personal life: Aguilar was born in Grenoble, Isère to a French mother and a Spanish father. He was once called to the Bolivia national team even though he has no Bolivian descent, due to a Football Manager database mismatch.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the AS Monaco FC websiteRuben Aguilar at the French Football Federation (in French)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 19 May 2024As of match played 11 November 2020
CONTENT.International career: On 9 November 2020, Aguilar was called-up to the France national team for the first time, having previously never played for France at any level.

SUMMARY: Ruben Aguilar (born 26 April 1993) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back for  Ligue 1 club Lens.
